sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84787" key="poludra/steia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-δράστεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δράω</etym>) <sense id="n84787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she that effects much,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
